docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-11-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES. A REPRESENTATIVE FROM GEICO INSURANCE APPEARNED ON BEHALF OF THE DEEFNDANT.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE HASSELL LAW GROUP INFORMING THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT HARSHA HEGDE WAS SERVED BY REGISTERED MAIL.
DECLARATION OF LACK OF PROCESS OF SMALL CLAIMS COMPLAINT. REQUESTING FOR A RESET OF HEARING, FILED BY THE ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF ALYSON JACKS.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HEGDE, HARSHA
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-10-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-11-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKS, ALYSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEGDE, HARSHA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $190.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,690.00, ALTHOUGH THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF SHARES COMPARITIVE FAULT FOR THE SUBJECT COLLISION, HER MEDICAL EXPENSES, AFTER ADJUSTMENT FOR COMPARITIVE NEGLIGENCE MEET THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT OF THE SMALL CKAIMS COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKS, ALYSON AS TO DEFENDANT HEGDE, HARSHA
CORRESPONDENCE FROM HASSELL LAW GROUP INFORMING THE COURT REGARDING SERVICE BY CERTIFIED MAIL ON THE DIRECTOR OF DMV.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. MARIE BACHMANN FROM HIS INSURANCE COMPANY GEICO. PER MARIE BACHMANN, DEFENDANT RESIDES IN NEW JERSY. MARIE BACHMANN SUBMITS DECLARATION ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JACKS, ALYSON AS TO DEFENDANT HEGDE, HARSHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-07-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HEGDE, HARSHA
PROOF OF SERVICE ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF;SERVED BY PERSONAL SERVICE SEPT-04-2010 (FEE FOR SERVICE:$95.00) AS TO DEFENDANT HEGDE, HARSHA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
